parts.text: {"family":"Enyne Metathesis","candidate":{"candidate_id":"C1","substrate_smiles":["C=CCCCCCC","C#CCCCC"],"product_smiles":["CCCC/C=C/C=C/CCCCCC"],"optional_reagent_smiles":["[Ru]"],"rationale":"Classic intermolecular cross-enyne metathesis between a terminal alkene and alkyne.","collision_avoidance_note":"Avoids radical motifs (Barton-like) and halogenated substrates.
